title: UsageEvent
description: Emitted to Kafka after every AI call. The most load-bearing schema in the platform — consumed by Treasury for billing and cost enforcement (D022, D024).

eventId.description: Unique event identifier for idempotent consumption

appId.description: Functional identifier of the app that initiated the AI call

userId.description: End-user identifier within the app (attribution only; app manages its own user auth)

model.description: Exact model identifier as returned by the provider after possible downshift

tokensIn.description: Input tokens consumed by this call

tokensOut.description: Output tokens produced by this call

computedCost.description: Cost in USD computed by the AI gateway from provider pricing at call time

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the AI call completed
